---
title: "COPD Risk Factor Analysis"
subtitle: "An R-based epidemiological research project"
---

## Project Summary

This project examines demographic, behavioral, and clinical factors associated with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease. The analysis is designed to demonstrate a complete research workflow, from data preparation through statistical modeling and interpretation.

## Research Question

Which participant characteristics are associated with increased odds of COPD?

## Analytical Workflow

1. Import and validate the dataset.
2. Clean variables and handle missing observations.
3. Summarize the study population.
4. Visualize COPD prevalence across major risk factors.
5. Fit an adjusted logistic regression model.
6. Interpret adjusted odds ratios and confidence intervals.

## Tools

R, tidyverse, ggplot2, broom, janitor, gt, Quarto, and GitHub Pages.

## Featured Output

After running the analysis, place your strongest figure in `figures/featured_plot.png` and uncomment the line below.

<!-- ![Featured COPD visualization](figures/featured_plot.png) -->

## Project Links

- [View the full analysis](analysis.qmd)
- [View the source code](https://github.com/YOUR-USERNAME/copd-research-project)
